app.name: Manticore Search
app.one_liner: Easy to use open source fast database for search, positioned as a high-performance alternative to Elasticsearch.

screens.name: Search Dashboard
screens.purpose: Provide an entry point to manage indexes, run queries, and monitor performance metrics.

rust_commands.name: optimize_index
rust_commands.purpose: Trigger background index optimization (e.g., AUTOOPTIMIZE) to improve query performance.

rust_commands.name: sync_daemon_stats
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and reconcile global daemon statistics, especially after Buddy communication events.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic HTTP/JSON API layer
week 1: Set up core C++ search engine with SQL interface
acceptance_tests: Daemon global stats must remain consistent after Buddy communication events.
Queries on small datasets must execute at least 100x faster than equivalent MySQL full-text queries.
System must handle concurrent AUTOOPTIMIZE requests without crashing or corrupting state.
